hero.metaTitle: Metal Suspended Ceiling Systems | Design, Engineering & Execution | AvizSazeh
hero.metaDescription: AvizSazeh designs, engineers, manufactures and installs metal suspended ceiling systems, including linear metal ceilings, open cell ceilings, baffle ceilings and metal ceiling tiles for commercial and architectural projects.
hero.imageAlt: Engineered metal suspended ceiling installed in a large-scale architectural space
hero.headline: Metal Suspended Ceiling Systems — Engineered from Design to Execution
hero.subheadline: AvizSazeh translates architectural ceiling concepts into structurally validated, manufacturable, and site-executable metal suspended ceiling systems — from design intent to installed reality.
hero.description: We do not sell materials. We deliver executable ceiling systems.
hero.cardTitle: A ceiling is an engineered system — not a product.
hero.cardText: We integrate design, engineering, materials and installation into high-performance ceiling systems.

systems.title: Engineered Metal Ceiling Systems
systems.description: Each system is selected from architectural geometry, structural logic, and execution feasibility — not from stock availability.

engineering.title: From design to buildable reality
engineering.description: Translating architectural intent into controlled execution across four structured stages.

steps.title: Design
steps.text: Architectural intent review, ceiling layout logic, system selection.

steps.title: Engineering
steps.text: Technical drawings, coordination logic, structural and execution review.

steps.title: Manufacturing
steps.text: Custom production, material preparation, quality-controlled fabrication.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Installation planning, site coordination, quality control and handover.

execution.title: Controlled execution — across demanding heights and climates
execution.summary: Controlled documentation, production coordination and post-installation quality review.

capabilities.title: Technical office & shop drawings
capabilities.text: Shop-drawing preparation with control of ceiling geometry and detailing.

capabilities.title: Production coordination & custom fabrication
capabilities.text: Production matched to the drawings and real project conditions, fully coordinated.

capabilities.title: Installation teams & site execution control
capabilities.text: Control of alignment, rhythm, connections, hangers and execution tolerance — up to 50 m.

capabilities.title: Project reporting & quality inspection
capabilities.text: Progress reporting and post-installation quality review to deliver the architectural result.

proof.title: We have built what we claim.
proof.description: Over 300 executed projects — from infrastructure and industrial sites to commercial centres and public buildings. AvizSazeh's credibility comes from turning architectural design into a system that is manufacturable, installable, and controllable in execution.

differentiation.title: Why AvizSazeh Is Not a Material Seller
differentiation.subtitle: Material sellers and generic contractors transfer the risk of the final result to the project. AvizSazeh defines, manufactures, and executes the ceiling as a complete engineered system.
differentiation.closing: AvizSazeh treats your ceiling project as an engineered system — not as a materials order.

systemsPage.title: Ceiling Engineering Systems
systemsPage.intro: AvizSazeh defines ceiling solutions as architectural engineering systems rather than products. System selection is based on architectural geometry, load requirements, functional zoning, and execution constraints.
systemsPage.principle: Architecture defines the problem. Engineering defines the solution. Execution defines reality.

engineeringPage.title: Engineering & Execution System
engineeringPage.intro: Design is meaningless until it becomes a buildable system. AvizSazeh bridges architectural design and real-world execution, reducing project risk through engineering-driven ceiling systems.
engineeringPage.processTitle: The project path — from analysis to handover

process.title: Inquiry & consultation
process.text: Receive project information, assess needs, and provide a technical and financial proposal.

process.title: Contract & production
process.text: Finalise design, scheduling, and transparent pricing; sign the contract and manufacture.

process.title: Installation & delivery
process.text: Precise fabrication and installation per contract, delivered on time.

engineeringPage.proofTitle: Engineering output is not just an explanation — it is a buildable document.
engineeringPage.proofIntro: On every project, the AvizSazeh technical team aims to turn architectural design into drawings, details, manufacturable parts, and a controllable installation path.
engineeringPage.proofNote: The examples shown are conceptual diagrams of engineering output, not documentation from a specific project.

proofCards.title: Shop drawings
proofCards.text: Turning architectural design into precise execution drawings with connection details and buildable dimensions.

proofCards.title: Production logic
proofCards.text: Defining parts, cutting patterns, and build sequence for controlled, low-error manufacturing.

proofCards.title: Installation method
proofCards.text: Setting the installation order, suspension points, and execution details for a controllable on-site build.

proofCards.title: Quality control
proofCards.text: Reviewing execution against the drawings and approved quality criteria through to final handover.

bimPage.title: BIM coordination for engineered metal ceilings
bimPage.intro: In architectural and commercial projects, the metal ceiling must be coordinated with lighting, HVAC, fire detection/suppression, maintenance access, and architectural detailing. With a systems view, AvizSazeh turns the ceiling into a coordinable part of the project's execution model.
bimPage.sectionsTitle: Coordinating the ceiling in the execution model

sections.title: Why BIM matters for metal suspended ceilings
sections.text: The metal ceiling is the layer with the most interference from services above it. Modelling the ceiling in BIM exposes conflicts before execution and keeps detailing under control.

sections.title: Coordination with MEP and lighting
sections.text: Luminaires, diffusers, sprinklers, and detectors are aligned with the ceiling rhythm and module so the final result is regular, symmetrical, and buildable.

sections.title: Reducing site conflicts
sections.text: Detecting clashes between hangers, substructure, and service routes in the model reduces rework and site stoppages.

sections.title: From architectural model to shop drawings
sections.text: The coordinated model becomes shop drawings with precise levels, modules, and connection details.

sections.title: What we need from architects and consultants
sections.text: Reflected ceiling plans, finished levels, MEP and lighting layouts, and the final architectural expectation are the inputs we need for precise coordination.

bimPage.ctaTitle: Submit your ceiling for engineering coordination
bimPage.ctaText: Send your drawings and project conditions so we can analyse the ceiling as a coordinated part of the execution model.

aboutPage.title: The translator between architecture and execution
aboutPage.subtitle: AvizSazeh is built for projects where the ceiling is not just a cover — it is part of the architectural identity, the quality of the space, and the engineering control of the project.
aboutPage.lead: AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan is an architectural engineering system brand that transforms architectural intent into buildable ceiling systems through engineering, customisation, and controlled execution.
story: Since the 1990s, the core AvizSazeh team has worked in suspended metal ceilings — from large-scale airports and industrial complexes to commercial, corporate, and public spaces — on projects with high technical complexity and exacting architectural requirements, in close collaboration with architects and contractors.
AvizSazeh's technical office produces project-specific shop drawings for every project, controls manufacturing against approved standards, and directs execution through to final handover.
AvizSazeh has drawn on technical cooperation and specialised supply with selected international companies in Italy and Turkey, and its systems integrate with CBI Europe radiant systems.
AvizSazeh is active across Iran, Iraq, and Oman, and is ready to collaborate on regional projects.
principles: Every design must translate into an executable system.
Material selection without engineering is a risk.
aboutPage.riskTitle: Why material-only ceiling supply is risky
aboutPage.riskText: When only material is purchased, detailing, MEP coordination, alignment and visual-rhythm control, and responsibility for the final result are left to the client and contractor. That transfers execution and architectural-quality risk to the project.
aboutPage.roleTitle: Our role between architect, consultant, contractor, and owner
aboutPage.roleText: AvizSazeh stands between the architect's intent, the consultant's specification, the contractor's execution, and the owner's expectation — aligning them into one executable ceiling system.
aboutPage.responsibilityText: We are responsible through to delivery of the architectural result — from shop drawings and controlled production to control of installation, alignment, connections, hangers, and final quality.
aboutPage.conceptTitle: From concept to executable ceiling system
aboutPage.conceptText: We take the architectural ceiling concept and, through engineering, manufacturing, and controlled execution, turn it into an executable ceiling aligned with the project's identity.
aboutPage.teamNote: Profiles of the engineering team will be published soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan collects through this website, how it is used, and the choices available to you. We only collect information needed to respond to engineering and procurement enquiries.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: When you submit a Request for Quotation (RFQ) or contact us, we collect the details you provide — such as your name, company, phone number, project type, area, location and technical requirements. We do not ask for, or intentionally collect, sensitive personal data.

sections.heading: How we use your information
sections.body: Submitted information is used solely to classify your project, prepare an engineering assessment and respond with a relevant proposal. It is not sold or rented to third parties.

sections.heading: CRM and processing
sections.body: RFQ submissions are recorded in our internal customer relationship management (CRM) system so the engineering team can follow up. Access is limited to authorised AvizSazeh personnel.

sections.heading: Data retention
sections.body: Enquiry records are kept only as long as needed to handle your request and meet legitimate business and legal obligations, after which they are removed or anonymised.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
sections.body: The website uses only the cookies required for it to function. If privacy-friendly analytics are enabled, they are used in aggregate to understand traffic and do not identify individual visitors.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may ask us to access, correct or delete the information you have submitted. To make a request, contact us using the details below.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any question about this policy or your data, email info@avizsazeh.ir.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan website. By using the site you agree to them. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

sections.heading: Use of the website
sections.body: You may use this website for lawful purposes related to learning about and enquiring into our ceiling systems and engineering services. You agree not to misuse the site, disrupt its operation or attempt unauthorised access.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The content, brand, designs, system documentation and imagery on this site belong to AvizSazeh Naghsh Jahan or its licensors and may not be reproduced or redistributed without written permission.

sections.heading: RFQ submissions and quotations
sections.body: Information returned by the RFQ engine — including the suggested system and complexity assessment — is an automated, indicative classification, not a binding offer. Any formal quotation is confirmed separately by our engineering team.

sections.heading: Accuracy and availability
sections.body: We work to keep technical information accurate and the site available, but we provide the site on an "as is" basis without warranties, and we may update content or specifications at any time.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, AvizSazeh is not liable for indirect or consequential loss arising from use of this website or reliance on its content. Engineering decisions should be confirmed with our team for your specific project.

sections.heading: External links
sections.body: The site may link to third-party services (for example a map provider). We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of external sites.

sections.heading: Governing law and changes
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Islamic Republic of Iran. We may update them from time to time; the current version always applies. For questions, email info@avizsazeh.ir.
